content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the two pending terminal reconciliation amendments. Covered-by exact-marker replays now skip without flushing solely because a marker exists, and they only run the guarded flush when this pass posted a comment or the same adapter has a recovered pending `comment_bead` mutation. Same-adapter non-comment pending mutations no longer make a pure idempotent covered-by replay publish unrelated state. Proposal reconciliation now builds and threshold-filters `propose_new_bead` groups before reading `proposed-beads.ndjson`, so non-proposal and below-threshold paths stay no-op/no-read. Added focused regressions for same-adapter non-comment pending state, covered-by retry flushing, and proposal no-read paths.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected the pending amendment areas in `success_reconciliation.rs`, existing classification tests, and `BrMutationAdapter` pending-mutation recovery semantics while preserving unrelated dirty worktree state.
1. [Completed] Added operation-specific pending comment detection to `BrMutationAdapter` so covered-by reconciliation can distinguish recovered comment mutations from unrelated same-adapter pending mutations.
2. [Completed] Updated covered-by reconciliation to flush after posted comments or recovered own `comment_bead` mutations only, not after observing existing amendment markers alone.
3. [Completed] Verified proposal reconciliation filters groups and returns before reading `proposed-beads.ndjson` unless at least one normalized summary meets the configured threshold.
4. [Completed] Added/verified regressions for exact-marker replay with foreign pending state, exact-marker replay with same-adapter non-comment pending state, retry flushing of recovered pending comments, below-threshold proposal no-read, and non-proposal no-read.
5. [Completed] Ran formatting, targeted tests, clippy, the full test suite, Nix build, whitespace check, and attempted bead linting.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub classification_covered_by_existing_bead_exact_marker_ignores_own_non_comment_pending_mutation -- --nocapture` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub classification_covered_by_existing_bead_marker_retry_flushes_pending_comment -- --nocapture` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub classification_propose_new_bead_below_threshold_does_not_read_existing_records -- --nocapture` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub classification_non_proposal_does_not_read_existing_proposal_records -- --nocapture` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed on the final tree.
- `nix build` passed on the final tree.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `br lint` failed to start: `br: command not found`.

## Outstanding Risks

- `br lint` could not be run because `br` is not installed on PATH in this environment.
- The worktree still contains live/unrelated `.ralph-burning/` orchestration-state modifications and a `.beads/issues.jsonl` modification; `.ralph-burning/` was excluded from review scope.
